author: Ishan Godawatta
name: [Non-record] 11L XSA + LQER + SparseAttnGate + BOS-Fixed SmearGate + 9-hparam stack + SWA blend
blurb: Non-record submission. PR #1855's full stack PLUS Stochastic Weight Averaging blended into the EMA shadow before GPTQ. 3-seed mean: 1.06140 BPB (std 0.00044) — +0.32 mbpb worse than current SOTA (PR #1855, 1.06108). Submitted as non-record to contribute three findings: (1) hardware-calibration shift of +1.25 mbpb measured on this hardware via byte-identical PR #1855 vanilla replication (Pod F, val_bpb 1.06114 vs published 1.05989), confirming PR #1981's calibration observation at smaller magnitude; (2) SWA composes cleanly with the LQER asymmetric int4 + per-group lrzip pipeline, giving ~0.9 mbpb improvement vs vanilla on the same hardware (not enough to overcome the calibration shift and clear the 1.05608 record bar); (3) reproducibility checkpoint within ±0.4 mbpb per seed of published numbers.
technique_summary: PR #1855 stack (11L XSA + LQER int4-rank4 + SparseAttnGate + BOS-fixed SmearGate + Polar-Express Muon + per-group lrzip compression + 9-hparam stack) + SWA blend (final 5%, snapshot every 50 steps, blend 0.5 into EMA shadow before GPTQ).
